summary: Iteration 35: P1 Grouping Fix fully verified. All 21 backend tests passed. All 4 division pages load correctly with updated counts (Trauma=16, Cardiovascular=8, Diagnostics=59, Joint Replacement=4). Frontend uses generic CatalogDivision component with 'Portfolio' breadcrumb. Product detail pages show dynamic division routing.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products collection with P1 grouping fixes applied
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Grouping Fix complete. Division counts: Trauma=16, Cardiovascular=8, Diagnostics=59, Joint Replacement=4. Key changes: (1) ARMAR Titanium Plates renamed to 'ARMAR LPS Plating System (Titanium)', (2) 27 PFRN 4.9mm bolt pages consolidated into 1, (3) CLAVO Intramedullary Nail duplicate hidden, (4) Destiknee triplicates consolidated to 1, (5) HIV+Syphilis pack variants consolidated, (6) CLAVO Elastic has '(Pediatric)' context. All division pages use generic CatalogDivision.jsx with 'Home > Portfolio > {Division}' breadcrumb. Product detail breadcrumbs use dynamic division routing.
